name: notion
description: Mega-slice: bundles editor + databases + templates + workspace-io + wrappers + config provider as one drop-in. Re-exported from frontend/slices/notion/. Portable bundle for embedding the Notion experience in other React projects.
notes: Backend (convex/) is co-required but not part of this barrel — consumers ship their own convex/ dir or use the npm-published convex package once it exists. NotionAppConfig defaults match Nosion's own conventions; override via NotionAppProvider config prop.
